briefdescription.para: This function reads a register value from specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: Offset from the base address to be read

simplesect.para: Register value

briefdescription.para: This function writes a register value to specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: Offset from the base address to be written

simplesect.para: none

briefdescription.para: This function writes a register value to specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: Offset from the base address to be written

simplesect.para: none This function gets the Maximum supported Bus Number
Maximum supported number of buses

briefdescription.para: This function looks for phy is ready or not.

simplesect.para: 1 if phy is ready 0 if phy is not ready

briefdescription.para: This function looks for PCIe link is up or not.

simplesect.para: 1 if link is up 0 if link is down

briefdescription.para: This function waits for phy link to come up till XPCIEPSU_LINK_WAIT_MAX_RETRIES times.

simplesect.para: 1 if link is up 0 if link up fail

briefdescription.para: This function initializes PCIe bridge.

detaileddescription.para: Enables/Disables required channels, checks for links, ECAM, Interrupts.

simplesect.para: 0 if success error value on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_ComposeExternalConfigAddress

briefdescription.para: This function Composes configuration space location.

simplesect.para: location address of the composed address

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 *DataPtr)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_ReadConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: This function read from remote configuration space location.

parameterdescription.para: location of the address to read data from.
pointer store date available in the offset

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 Data)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_WriteConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: This function write to remote configuration space location.

parameterdescription.para: location of the address to write data.
to be written on to the offset

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.

briefdescription.para: Read 32-bit value from one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the XPciePsu instance to operate on.
from beginning of IP own configuration space.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the value read from the specified location.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.
None

briefdescription.para: Write 32-bit value to one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
from beggininng of IP own configuration space.
to be written to the specified location.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure.
This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: This function reserves bar memory address.

simplesect.para: bar address

briefdescription.para: This function Compare two different sizes.

parameterdescription.para: is First Variable to compare size
is Second Variable to compare size

simplesect.para: Difference of sizes, Zero for Equal

briefdescription.para: This function Aligns BAR Resources.

parameterdescription.para: Combination of Location and Offset value

simplesect.para: void

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u64 *Value, u8 MaxBars, u32 *Index, u64 *Size, u8 BarAllocControl)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_BarMemoryAlloc

briefdescription.para: This function Allocates Bar Memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a Combination of Location and Offset value
Maximum Requested BARs,6 for EP and 2 for bridge
is to differentiate Unsorted and Sorted Bar Sizes

simplesect.para: Void

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *InstancePtr, u32 Headertype, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_AllocBarSpace

briefdescription.para: This function Composes configuration space location.

simplesect.para: int XST_SUCCESS on success err on fail

briefdescription.para: This function increments to next 1Mb page starting position of non prefetchable memory.
This function discovers the system topology and assigns bus numbers and system resources.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns primary, secondary and subordinate bus numbers. Assigns memory to prefetchable and non-prefetchable memory locations. enables end-points and bridges.

parameterdescription.para: to scans for connected bridges/endpoints on it.

simplesect.para: none

briefdescription.para: This function starts PCIe enumeration.

simplesect.para: 1 if success 0 if fails

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the config space and PCIe bridge.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success err on failure

briefdescription.para: Implements all of functions for psu_pci IP driver except interrupts and initialization.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 bs 08/21/2018 First release
